prepared.module target=riscv64-linux-gnu route=semantic_bir_shared
completed_phases: legalize stack_layout liveness out_of_ssa regalloc
invariants:
  - no_target_facing_i1
  - no_phi_nodes
notes:
  - [prealloc] prealloc owns the shared semantic-BIR to prealloc-BIR route before MIR lowering
  - [legalize] bootstrap BIR legalize kept semantic CFG and phi form intact while promoting i1 values plus function signature/storage bookkeeping, memory-address/load-store bookkeeping, and call ABI metadata
  - [stack_layout] stack layout prepared function 'chk' with 386 home slot(s) and 1544 bytes of frame space
  - [stack_layout] stack layout prepared function 'go' with 386 home slot(s) and 1544 bytes of frame space
  - [stack_layout] stack layout prepared function 'main' with 0 home slot(s) and 0 bytes of frame space
  - [stack_layout] stack layout now emits provisional stack objects, elides dead and copy-coalesced home slots, and only allocates frame storage for objects that still require dedicated homes
  - [liveness] liveness now computes BIR named-value intervals, exact def/use program points, predecessor-edge phi uses, call points, CFG-aware live-through extension, and loop depth independently of stack-layout object identity
  - [out_of_ssa] out_of_ssa removed phi nodes from live prepared BIR and published authoritative join-transfer plus parallel-copy obligations
  - [regalloc] regalloc seeded function 'chk' with 867 allocation constraint(s) and 0 interference edge(s) from active liveness; assigned 29 register(s) and 838 stack slot(s)
  - [regalloc] regalloc seeded function 'go' with 550 allocation constraint(s) and 0 interference edge(s) from active liveness; assigned 25 register(s) and 525 stack slot(s)
  - [regalloc] regalloc seeded function 'main' with 4 allocation constraint(s) and 1 interference edge(s) from active liveness; assigned 4 register(s) and 0 stack slot(s)
--- prepared-bir ---

bir.func @chk(i32 %p.x, i32 %p.y) -> i32 {
entry:
  bir.store_local %lv.i, i32 0
  bir.store_local %lv.r, i32 0
  bir.br for.cond.7
for.cond.7:
  %t0 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.i
  %t1 = bir.slt i32 %t0, 8
  bir.cond_br i32 %t1, block_7, block_8
for.latch.7:
  %t4 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.i
  %t5 = bir.add i32 %t4, 1
  bir.store_local %lv.i, i32 %t5
  bir.br for.cond.7
block_7:
  %t6 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.r
  %t7 = bir.load_global ptr @t
  %t8 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.i
  %t9 = bir.mul i32 8, %t8
  %t10 = bir.add i32 %p.x, %t9

bir.func @go(i32 %p.n, i32 %p.x, i32 %p.y) -> i32 {
entry:
  bir.store_local %lv.param.x, i32 %p.x
  bir.store_local %lv.param.y, i32 %p.y
  %t0 = bir.eq i32 %p.n, 8
  bir.cond_br i32 %t0, block_18, block_19
block_18:
  %t3 = bir.load_global i32 @N
  %t4 = bir.add i32 %t3, 1
  bir.store_global @N, i32 %t4
  bir.ret i32 0
block_19:
  bir.br for.cond.20
for.cond.20:
  %t5 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.param.y
  %t6 = bir.slt i32 %t5, 8
  bir.cond_br i32 %t6, block_20, block_21
for.latch.20:
  %t9 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.param.y
  %t10 = bir.add i32 %t9, 1
  bir.store_local %lv.param.y, i32 %t10
  bir.br for.cond.20
block_20:
  bir.br for.cond.22
for.cond.22:
  %t11 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.param.x
  %t12 = bir.slt i32 %t11, 8
  bir.cond_br i32 %t12, block_22, block_23

  %t15 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.param.x

bir.func @main() -> i32 {
entry:
  %t1 = bir.call ptr calloc(i64 64, i64 4)
  ; call_arg_source index=0 encoding=immediate
  ; call_arg_source index=1 encoding=immediate
  bir.store_global @t, ptr %t1
  %t2 = bir.call i32 go(i32 0, i32 0, i32 0)
  ; call_arg_source index=0 encoding=immediate
  ; call_arg_source index=1 encoding=immediate
  ; call_arg_source index=2 encoding=immediate
  %t3 = bir.load_global i32 @N
  %t4 = bir.ne i32 %t3, 92
  bir.cond_br i32 %t4, block_27, block_28
block_27:
  bir.ret i32 1
block_28:
  bir.ret i32 0
}

    abi_binding destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register abi_index=0 placement=gpr:call_argument#0/w1 reg=a0
    abi_binding destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register abi_index=1 placement=gpr:call_argument#1/w1 reg=a1

    preserve value=%p.n value_id=867 route=callee_saved_register save_index=0 placement=gpr:callee_saved#0/w1 reg=s1 bank=gpr
